name: reaudit
description: AI Search Visibility Platform — Track, optimize, and amplify your brand presence across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and 7 more AI engines. 163 tools: visibility scoring, prompt tracking, GEO content generation, AI Commerce Shopping visibility via Google Merchant Center (competitive share of voice, product feed health), paid intelligence with multi-platform ad campaigns (Google, Meta, LinkedIn, X, and ChatGPT Ads on OpenAI), Adthena-style ChatGPT competitor ad intelligence, CRO with funnel analysis and A/B testing, revenue attribution, Reddit lead monitoring, Bing Webmaster, GitHub auto-fix pull requests, and interactive MCP App visualizations.
